  Researched and authored the execution roadmap for a new EC2 in the Nelanco AWS account that runs the full truesight_autopilot stack AND an interactive Claude Code session drivable from the Claude mobile app via 'claude --remote-control'. Work: (1) verified via docs that --remote-control (not --cloud) keeps execution + credentials on the box with the mobile app as a window; (2) mapped Sophia's current credential/deploy model and the Nelanco EC2 topology; (3) wrote a §5-compliant roadmap (pre-flight completeness, one-PR-per-turn sequence with always-stop gates for identity/infra/creds/autonomy, resume tracker, 6-step UAT) plus 5 open decisions. Merged as PR #657.
